response.original_title: TK from 凛として時雨 10th Anniversary Session presented by WOWOW
response.overview: Ten years since the start of his solo project, TK from Ling tosite sigure summarizes his past decade of music with the best-of album egomaniac feedback. The album comes with 15 songs including the digital single melt with Yorushika vocalist suis and tie-in singles like the Tokyo Ghoul anime theme songs unrave and katharsis. Three new songs are also included on the album. This edition comes with a booklet and Blu-ray containing music videos, live footage and a re-recording of film A moment, the starting point of TK's solo activities.
response.title: TK from Ling tosite sigure 10th Anniversary Session presented by WOWOW

release_dates.note: Released on Bluray of the limited edition of the compilation album "egomaniac feedback".

results.name: TK from 凛として時雨 BEST ALBUM 『egomaniac feedback』 Trailer
